Name: Average of Color Format for Flow minus Max of CURVALUE
Measure Max AAF%
Expression: DIVIDE('DATATBL'[Max AAF], AVERAGE('DATATBL'[Color Format for Flow]))

Name: Measure1
Expression: Var Maxvale = UNION(ROW("Value",SELECTEDVALUE(DATATBL[CURVALUE])),Row("Value",[Rolling 3 Months Minimum])) return MINX(Maxvale,[Value])
Notes: Min of selected vs rolling 3-mo min

Name: Rolling 3 Months Minimum max per DATESTAMP
Rolling 3 Months Minimum max per DATESTAMP divided by Color Format for Flow
Expression: DIVIDE([Rolling 3 Months Minimum max per DATESTAMP],AVERAGE('DATATBL'[Color Format for Flow]))

Name: Color Format for Flow % difference from Rolling 3 Months Minimum max per DATESTAMP
Expression: VAR __BASELINE_VALUE = [Rolling 3 Months Minimum max per DATESTAMP] VAR __VALUE_TO_COMPARE = SUM('DATATBL'[Color Format for Flow]) RETURN IF(NOT ISBLANK(__VALUE_TO_COMPARE),DIVIDE(__VALUE_TO_COMPARE - __BASELINE_VALUE, __BASELINE_VALUE))
